features: BENYLIN Herbal Chesty Coughs Syrup made with 100% naturally derived Ivy Leaf extract is a herbal remedy used to relieve a chesty cough
This sugar free syrup has a pleasant and sweet taste
Non-drowsy formulation can be used day and night. One bottle of BENYLIN Herbal Chesty Coughs contains doses for over 8 days
Herbal cough mixture contains an extract made from wild growing ivy leaves manually harvested in spring and summer
BENYLIN is the UK's #1 selling Cough brand** with over 50 years of cough experience
description: Product Description If you have a chesty cough that’s bothering you and you’re seeking a herbal remedy that has been used to treat chesty cough associated with common cold, then consider BENYLIN® Herbal Chesty Coughs. BENYLIN® Herbal Chesty Coughs is a sugar free medicine which contains an extract made from 100% wild growing ivy leaves manually harvested in spring and summer. This herbal cough syrup does not make you drowsy so you can use it confidently during the day as well as at night. One bottle of BENYLIN® Herbal Chesty Coughs contains enough doses for over 8 days. BENYLIN® Herbal Cough medicine has no artificial colours and is sugar free. Always read the label before using BENYLIN® Herbal Chesty Coughs. BENYLIN® has over 50 years of cough experience and is currently the number one selling UK cough brand** Disclaimer: Traditional herbal medicinal product for use in chesty cough associated with the common cold exclusively based on longstanding use as a traditional remedy. Always read the label. UK-BE-2200080 *Associated with the common cold **Source ©2022 NielsenIQ data, Value, Units, Cough Category (client defined) 52 w/e 03.09.22 (GB Total Coverage). For claims verification please call 0808238999. BENYLIN® Chesty Coughs Non-Drowsy. BENYLIN® Dry & Tickly Cough Syrup. BENYLIN® Children’s Dry Cough & Sore Throat Syrup. BENYLIN® Mucus Cough Max Honey & Lemon Flavour 100 mg/5 ml Syrup, contains Guaifenesin. Always Read The Label. Ingredients 4 ml of Syrup contain 33 mg of Extract (as Dry Extract) of Ivy Leaf (Hedera Helix L.), (Der 4-8:1), Extraction Solvent: Ethanol 30 % m/m, Also contains Sorbitol (E 420) Manufacturer Contact Information GB: Kenvue UK Ltd 50-100 Holmers Farm Way High Wycombe HP12 4EG UK Questions? www.kenvuecontact.com See more
